title: Lebanon backs deconfliction cell proposal, but ties support to Israeli withdrawal

snapshot.title: Lebanon backs deconfliction cell proposal, but ties support to Israeli withdrawal
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: Lebanon has welcomed a proposal to establish a deconfliction cell aimed at halting military operations in the country, but officials say any such mechanism must lead to a lasting ceasefire and the withdrawal of Israeli forces from occupied Lebanese territory. The proposal emerged from US-Iran talks held in Switzerland and was announced in a joint statement by mediators
snapshot.author: NAJIA HOUSSARI
snapshot.pageTitle: Lebanon backs deconfliction cell proposal, but ties support to Israeli withdrawal | Arab News
